## Summary

Describe the main change in 2 to 5 lines.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Balance or gameplay tuning
- [ ] UI or UX improvement
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor

-
-
-

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run dev`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Manual gameplay check completed
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed

## Screenshots Or Videos

Add before/after screenshots or short recordings when the change is visual.
